config.title: Kreator eksportu do Płatnika - docelowa lokalizacja pliku #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'wizzard #include "50209"
'CFileDrive #include "50211"
'SelectFolderNewFile #include "50123"
function c##CTRLID_FILENAME##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.text = container().m_strPath c##CTRLID_FILENAME##_ongetdata=true end function
function c##CTRLID_FILENAME##_ondataentered(ctrl, value) container().m_strPath = value c##CTRLID_FILENAME##_ondataentered = true end function
function select_XML_new_file() dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK)
if (not bOK) then view_message 6161, 0 exit function end if
dim strStartPath strStartPath = container().m_strPath
dim strStartFile strStartFile = pFD.GetFileName( strStartPath )
if (strStartFile="") then strStartFile = "Eksport_Do_Platnika_" + CStr(Year(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Month(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Day(Now)) + ".kdu" end if
strStartPath = pFD.GetPath( strStartPath )
if (strStartPath="") then strStartPath="c:\" else strStartPath=strStartPath end if
dim strFolderName strFolderName = SelectFolderNewFile(strStartPath, strStartFile)
dim strFileName strFileName=pFD.GetFileName( strFolderName )
if (pFD.GetFileExtension( strFileName )="" and strFileName<>"") then strFolderName=strFolderName+".kdu" end if
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FILENAME).text = strFolderName container().m_strPath = strFolderName end function
function OnFileRemove() page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FILENAME).text = "" container().m_strPath = "" end function
